genericOps.description: Insert a new block (fresh, non-colliding blockId) of blockType under parentId at the given child index, with props and optional delta text.
Shallow-merge a props patch into a block (a key set to undefined removes that prop) and/or replace its text (null clears); the block id is preserved.
Delete a block — mode "subtree" (default) removes it and all descendants; "reparent" splices its children into its parent at the block's former position.
Move a block under toParentId at toIndex — the index within the destination children AFTER the block is detached.
Split a block's delta text at a character offset in [0, textLength] into two blocks; the new sibling gets a freshly minted id.
Merge two or more contiguous sibling blocks (in document order) into a single block with a freshly minted id.
Run a named typed action from the block-actions registry against a structured block; the validated result applies as a shallow-merge updateBlock patch (same inverse/undo path).

actions.description: Upsert a line annotation keyed by its exact "lines" string (e.g. "4-9").

params.name: lines
params.description: Line range key, e.g. "1" or "4-9".

params.name: note
params.description: Annotation body.

params.name: label
params.description: Optional short label.

actions.description: Remove the annotation whose "lines" key matches exactly.

params.name: lines
params.description: Line range key of the annotation.

actions.description: Insert a row (cells padded/truncated to the column count); index defaults to the end.

params.name: cells
params.description: Cell strings, in column order.

params.name: index
params.description: Insert position in [0, rows.length]; default end.

actions.description: Remove the row at the given index.

params.name: index
params.description: Row index in [0, rows.length - 1].

actions.description: Set one cell, addressing the column by name (column) or position (columnIndex).

params.name: rowIndex
params.description: Row index in [0, rows.length - 1].

params.name: column
params.description: Column name — exactly one of column/columnIndex.

params.name: columnIndex
params.description: Column position — exactly one of column/columnIndex.

params.name: value
params.description: New cell value.

actions.description: Insert a column (default at the end), extending every row with the fill value.

params.name: name
params.description: New column name (must not already exist).

params.name: index
params.description: Insert position in [0, columns.length]; default end.

params.name: fill
params.description: Cell value for existing rows; default "".

actions.description: Remove a column by name (column) or position (columnIndex), shrinking every row.

params.name: column
params.description: Column name — exactly one of column/columnIndex.

params.name: columnIndex
params.description: Column position — exactly one of column/columnIndex.

actions.description: Append a path entry (optional note and change marker) to the file tree.

params.name: path
params.description: /-separated path, no leading "./"; a trailing "/" marks an explicit directory.

params.name: note
params.description: Short annotation rendered after the path.

params.name: change
params.description: Change marker: "added" | "removed" | "modified" | "renamed".

actions.description: Remove the entry with the given path from the file tree.

params.name: path
params.description: Exact path of the entry to remove.

actions.description: Patch an entry's note/change/from, or rename it via newPath (in place).

params.name: path
params.description: Exact path of the entry to patch.

params.name: note
params.description: New note; pass null to clear.

params.name: change
params.description: New change marker; pass null to clear.

params.name: from
params.description: Previous path (for renamed); pass null to clear.

params.name: newPath
params.description: Rename the entry to this path (kept in place).

actions.description: Append an operation signature ({ name, description?, params?, returns?, kind? }) to the surface.

params.name: name
params.description: Operation name, e.g. "file-tree.addEntry" (must not already exist).

params.name: description
params.description: One-line description of what the operation does.

params.name: params
params.description: Signature params: [{ name, type?, required?, description? }].

params.name: returns
params.description: What the operation returns/yields.

params.name: kind
params.description: Operation kind: "action" | "query" | "event" (default reading: action).

actions.description: Patch an operation (rename via patch.name; null clears description/params/returns/kind).

params.name: name
params.description: Current operation name.

params.name: patch
params.description: Partial operation; patch.name renames, null clears.

actions.description: Remove the operation with the given name from the surface.

params.name: name
params.description: Exact name of the operation to remove.
